chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 09 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 11.01.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.4 to 6 has filed a statement stating that out of entire amount of the petitioner’s retirement benefit, only Rs.1,12,129/- are outstanding, a cheque of which is already ready, which petitioner may collect from the office after executing a valid receipt. Learned Counsel is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. However, if an amount in respect of monthly pension is remaining, that shall also be paid to the petitioner in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
